revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 27 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 27 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月27日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、娘の嫁ぎ先の加賀[[前田家]]の敷地に赤門を建てる。現在の[[東京大学|東大]]赤門 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - 安政に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (元号)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月26日 (旧暦)|11月26日]] 翌日[[11月28日 (旧暦)|11月28日]] - 前月[[10月27日 (旧暦)|10月27日]] 翌月[[12月27日 (旧暦)|12月27日]] *新暦[[11月27日]]
{{stub}}

== できごと == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、娘の嫁ぎ先の加賀[[前田家]]の敷地に赤門を建てる。現在の[[東京大学|東大]]赤門 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - 安政に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]）

== できごと == * [[文明 (元号)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、娘の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]]

[[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]]

revision.comment: [[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 3 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q841078]] に転記
revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月27日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== 誕生日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友|德川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月27日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== 誕生日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月27日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== 誕生日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

{{Lunar November}} '''Lunar November27日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== 誕生日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
'''November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 27'''<!--Lunar November27--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== 誕生日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）

'''November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 27'''<!--Lunar November27--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== Events == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== Births == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== Deaths == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

{{Lunar November}} '''November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 27'''<!--Lunar November27 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== Births == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== Deaths == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== Commemorations ==

<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 27'''<!--Lunar November27 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される

== Deaths == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）

== Deaths == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

{{Lunar November}} '''November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 27'''<!--Lunar November27 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== Births == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== Deaths == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}}14年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}}’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}}) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}18年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}}, and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}}) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}10年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate (【ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門】, now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}元年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}元年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}}, a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}元年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}12年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}}, a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}}14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}}’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}}) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}18年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}}, and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}}) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}10年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate (【ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門】, now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}}, a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}}).

[[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}}14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}}’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}}) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}}, and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}}) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}}, now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}}, a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}}, a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}}14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}}) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}}’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}}) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}}, and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}}) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}}, now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}}, a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}}12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}}, a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}}).

[[sn:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|弘治}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).

[[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483|12=draft}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日|12=draft}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=draft}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏|12=draft}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱|12=draft}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=draft}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549|12=draft}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日|12=draft}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元|12=draft}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828|12=draft}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=draft}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855|12=draft}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日|12=draft}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日|12=draft}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556|12=draft}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝|12=draft}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時|12=draft}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829|12=draft}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日|12=draft}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=draft}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

{{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 27일]] [[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月廿七]] [[en:draft:November 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:11月27日 (旧暦)]]

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿七]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunmei (Japan)|ja|文明|12=draft|12=draft}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1483|ja|1483|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|January 6|ja|1月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=draft|12=draft}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Narushi|ja|足利成氏|12=draft|12=draft}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku no Ran|ja|享徳の乱|12=draft|12=draft}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=draft|12=draft}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1549|ja|1549|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|ja|今川義元|12=draft|12=draft}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|12=draft|12=draft}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1828|ja|1828|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|January 13|ja|1月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|ja|徳川家斉|12=draft|12=draft}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=draft|12=draft}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|January 15|ja|1月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaien|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1872|ja|1872|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Japan)|ja|Kōji|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1556|ja|1556|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|January 8|ja|1月8日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|ja|上杉景勝|12=draft|12=draft}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|ja|1623|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=draft|12=draft}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1829|ja|1829|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=draft|12=draft}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|ja|1755|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}} .

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月27日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]14年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1483年]][[1月6日]]） - [[室町幕府]]と[[古河公方]][[足利成氏]]との和議が成立して、[[関東地方]]で[[1455年]]以来続けられた内乱（[[享徳の乱]]）が終わる。 * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1549年]][[12月15日]]） - 三河の[[松平氏|松平]]領が[[今川義元]]の支配下となり、竹千代（後の[[徳川家康]]）が今川の人質として駿府へ出立 * [[文政]]10年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1828年]][[1月13日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が、息女[[溶姫]]の嫁ぎ先の[[加賀藩|加賀]][[前田家]]の敷地に[[御守殿#御守殿門|御守殿門]]（現在の[[東京大学|東大]][[東京大学の建造物#本郷キャンパス|赤門]]）を建てる。 * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月15日]]） - [[嘉永]]より安政に[[改元]] * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[12月27日]]） - 太政官布達により12月分の給与未支給が通告される
== 誕生日 == * [[弘治 (日本)|弘治]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1556年]]1月8日） - [[上杉景勝]]、[[大名]]（+ [[1623年]]） <!-- * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[12月22日]]） - [[徳川宗武]]、[[徳川吉宗]]の次男・[[田安徳川家]]の祖（+ [[1771年]]） -->
== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127}}

== 忌日 == * [[貞応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1223年]][[12月20日]]） - [[大友能直]]、[[武将]]（* [[1172年]]） * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]13年（ユリウス暦[[1481年]][[12月18日]]） - [[一休宗純]]、[[臨済宗]]の僧（* [[1394年]]） * [[享保]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1731年]][[1月5日]]） - [[徳川継友]]、[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1692年]]） * [[元文]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1737年]][[12月18日]]） - [[三井八郎右衛門#初代高平|三井高平]]、[[三越|越後屋呉服店]]創業・[[三井高利]]の子（* [[1653年]]） * [[文政]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1829年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鶴屋南北|4代目鶴屋南北]]、[[歌舞伎]]作者（* [[1755年]]）

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q841078]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 27|qq=November 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|qq=|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|qq=|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|qq=|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|qq=|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|qq=|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|qq=|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|qq=|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|qq=|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|qq=|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|qq=|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|qq=|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|qq=|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).
