== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿七]][[zh:十一月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿七]][[zh:十一月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿七]][[zh:十一月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q841078]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 27|qq=November 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei (Japan)]] 14th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1483|1483]] [[:en:January 6|January 6]] ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s [[:en:Ashikaga Shigeuji|Ashikaga Narushi]] reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the [[:en:Kyōtoku incident|Kyōtoku no Ran]] ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of [[:en:Imagawa Yoshimoto|Imagawa Yoshimoto]] , and Takechiyo (later known as [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 13|January 13]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ienari|Tokugawa Ienari]] built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 15|January 15]] ) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Kaei|Kaien]] to [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * [[:en:Kōji (Muromachi period)|Kōji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1556|1556]] [[:en:January 8|January 8]] ) – [[:en:Uesugi Kagekatsu|Uesugi Kagekatsu]] , a daimyō († [[:en:1623|1623]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ) – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1829|1829]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* [[:en:1755|1755]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|November 27|qq=November 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|WD=Q8432|lt=Bunmei (Japan)}} 14th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1483|en|1483|WD=Q6637|lt=1483}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|WD=Q2221|lt=January 6}} ) – The Muromachi shogunate and {{ill|Furukawa|ja|古河公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furukawa|1=Koga kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8017022}} ’s {{ill|Ashikaga Shigeuji|en|Ashikaga Shigeuji|WD=Q4306913|lt=Ashikaga Narushi}} reached an accord that ended the internal strife (the {{ill|Kyōtoku incident|en|Kyōtoku incident|WD=Q6453098|lt=Kyōtoku no Ran}} ) in the Kantō region which had persisted since 1455. * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1549|en|1549|WD=Q6554|lt=1549}} {{ill|December 15|en|December 15|WD=Q2383|lt=December 15}} ) – The Matsudaira domain of Mikawa fell under the control of {{ill|Imagawa Yoshimoto|en|Imagawa Yoshimoto|WD=Q1054305|lt=Imagawa Yoshimoto}} , and Takechiyo (later known as {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} ) was sent as a hostage to Sunpu. * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|WD=Q2255|lt=January 13}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|en|Tokugawa Ienari|WD=Q439717|lt=Tokugawa Ienari}} built a gate ({{ill|Omamiden|ja|御守殿門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omamiden|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 御守殿|1=Akamon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48807898}} , now the red gate of the University of Tokyo’s Hongo campus) on the estate of the Maeda clan in Kaga. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|WD=Q2260|lt=January 15}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaien}} to {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|December 27|en|December 27|WD=Q2800|lt=December 27}} ) – A notice was issued by the Daijōkan for non-payment of salaries for December.
== Births == * {{ill|Kōji (Muromachi period)|en|Kōji (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1143910|lt=Kōji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556}} {{ill|January 8|en|January 8|WD=Q2234|lt=January 8}} ) – {{ill|Uesugi Kagekatsu|en|Uesugi Kagekatsu|WD=Q1376605|lt=Uesugi Kagekatsu}} , a daimyō († {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|en|Hōjō Morotoki|WD=Q2672978|lt=Hojo Ujitoki}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1773|en|1773|WD=Q7692|lt=1773}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Iamasa|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Iamasa|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22}} ) – The 4th generation leader of {{ill|Tsuruyanin|ja|鶴屋南北|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruyanin|1=Tsuruya Namboku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1675237}} , a kabuki dramatist (* {{ill|1755|en|1755|WD=Q7627|lt=1755}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|26|11|28|10|27|12|11|1127|qq=}}
